Voting Information

Everything you need to know about registering, early voting, and casting your ballot in Ellis County.

You must be registered to vote at least 30 days before the election. Texas does not have same-day registration.

Upcoming Deadlines

2026 Texas Primary ElectionRegister by Feb 2, 2026
2026 Municipal ElectionsRegister by Apr 2, 2026
2026 General ElectionRegister by Oct 5, 2026
Register to Vote

Data Sources

Ellis County Elections TX Secretary of State Ballotpedia Vote411 / LWV
Data sourced from Ellis County Elections Department and Texas Secretary of State

This information is provided for civic education purposes only. Pivotal Voice does not endorse any candidate or party. All data is sourced from publicly available records and candidate-submitted information. Verify details with official election authorities.
